mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TENANT_REGISTRY ( tenant_id, tenant_name, domain, api_key, config_set_name, verification_status, quota_daily, quota_monthly, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{tenantName}, #{domain}, #{apiKey}, #{configSetName}, #{verificationStatus}, #{quotaDaily}, #{quotaMonthly}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT tenant_id, tenant_name, domain, api_key, config_set_name, verification_status, quota_daily, quota_monthly, status, created_at, updated_at FROM TENANT_REGISTRY WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId}
SELECT tenant_id, tenant_name, domain, api_key, config_set_name, verification_status, quota_daily, quota_monthly, status, created_at, updated_at FROM TENANT_REGISTRY WHERE api_key = #{apiKey}
SELECT tenant_id, tenant_name, domain, api_key, config_set_name, verification_status, quota_daily, quota_monthly, status, created_at, updated_at FROM TENANT_REGISTRY WHERE domain = #{domain}
SELECT tenant_id, tenant_name, domain, api_key, config_set_name, verification_status, quota_daily, quota_monthly, status, created_at, updated_at FROM TENANT_REGISTRY WHERE tenant_name = #{tenantName}
mapper.update: UPDATE TENANT_REGISTRY SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId}
UPDATE TENANT_REGISTRY SET verification_status = #{verificationStatus}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId}
UPDATE TENANT_REGISTRY SET api_key = #{apiKey}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ADM_EMAIL_SEND_DTL WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND send_sts_cd IN ('SD', 'SB', 'SC', 'SM') AND stm_fir_reg_dt >= CURRENT_DATE AND stm_fir_reg_dt < CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ADM_EMAIL_SEND_DTL WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND send_sts_cd IN ('SD', 'SB', 'SC', 'SM') AND stm_fir_reg_dt >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND stm_fir_reg_dt < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month'
